metadata.title: directly positively regulates example: phospholipase activity 'directly positively regulates' protein kinase c activity
metadata.comment: Phospholipase C (PLC) cleaves inositol triphosphate to yield diacylglycerol. Diacyglycerol binds directly to protein kinase C (PRKC) and activates it in the membrane where it can phosphorylate a variety of substrates.
